caption:
Some midnight glycogen depleted wisdom 🤓
Heard this great philosophy a few years back, and wanted to share with ya. 

Try changing “I HAVE to do” to “I GET to do” 
It’s a nice mental shift of a reminder that we GET TO because it’s a privilege. Whatever that thing is that’s HARD, whether you love or hate it, it’s the thing that sets you up for positive life results. I definitely needed the mental recalibrating tonight to get my ass in here to train. 

We don’t have to do it, we get to do it. 

Waking up Sunday morning is a whole lot sweeter knowing you got the shit done Saturday night 😉👊🏾

Look I LOVE SANTA 🎅🏾 as he’s as REAL as real can be, but he needs to have a talk with Rudolph, Dasher or Frumpy - these reindeer need to learn some manners and stop making a mess. I just saw a bunch of little reindeer 3 curlers all over the driveway 🦌💩🧐

🎅🏾🤫

I’m a Cane 4 Life and I’ll always take care of my @canesfootball family 🙌🏾 💪🏾 hooked the boys up with @PapaTui_ grooming kits for the entire Miami locker room. 

Best of luck today to my brother, former teammate and Head Coach Mario Cristobal, coaching staff and our players in their bowl game against Iowa State. 

I’ll be watching - @espn at 330pm est 

Proud of our Canes, they played hard this year with a respectful 10-2 record. 

But we know where we need to be and we know what we gotta do to “get there” in 2025. 

Finish strong tonight, bring in the New Year with your families, and then let’s get to work 💪🏾 

#theU 🙌🏾
#LFG

I was pumped when we found a special bag of Christmas gifts 🎁 for me today that got lost in all the Christmas Day mayhem! One of my long time favorite aloha shirt spots from my hometown of Honolulu. But unfortunately my Gyatt (as they say in the streets) is too big and ain’t fittin’ in these shorts 🩳😂 
#postchristmaslove 
#avanti

Life is big, so I love small Christmas gifts that have personal meaning 🎁🫶🏾

LOVED my gift from my 9yr old, Jazzy! 
She’s heard me say many times that my handshake means more than any contract or  agreement that I sign 🫱🏾‍🫲🏼 🖊️

She said, “dada you already have two hands so I got you a pen” 👈🏾 👏🏾👏🏾👏🏾 😂🥰

Raising my girls with that handshake mentality + accountability. When I meet someone, I can tell so much about them the second I shake their hand. Energy, intention and mana is real 🫱🏾‍🫲🏼💫 
Good or bad. 

#smallgifts #bigmeaning

We gotta be careful, there’s so much unhealthy toxicity out there on social media, and I’ve always tried to fly above it and not get pulled down into the sludge - and use my social influence/power for the good stuff. The stuff that makes a real positive impact in people’s lives. Life can be tough for a lot of folks, so let’s bring as much joy as we can to people. 

For me, it’ll always be the best part of fame. 

We gave a ton of cash away to every kid in this toy store for Christmas. Awesome day and cool to chop it up afterwards with my team - we’re grateful to have these special experiences 🥃

Special shout to Hamleys in London (worlds oldest and biggest toy store) for letting us come in and deliver a little joy - and a lot of chaos 😜

Merry Christmas ya filthy animals and chase the good stuff 🎅🏾🥃

Merry Christmas from me and my Uso @snoopdogg!
He does the 🌳
I do the 🥃 
We listen to the 🎶 
We talk that 💩
and we get along juuuust fine 
🤜🏾🤛🏾 😂

All my last minute @papatui_ Christmas shoppers - I got U 🤙🏾😉 head to @target and your Papa gift packs await for your man! 💪🏾

Thank you guys for making PapaTui the #1 new men’s grooming brand of 2024 🔥🥇🤜🏾🤛🏼

We only get one skin, so make sure you’re putting the good stuff on it - PapaTui 

🎅🏾

But how does it smell, DJ? 
AMAZING 😻😜 

Your feedback on our @papatui_ fragrances are phenomenal 👏🏾👏🏾 - THANK YOU - and I’m pumped to report that your FAVORITE scent is… 

LUSH COCONUT 🥥 🌊🥇

I wanted to create a scent that always took me back home to Hawaii 🤙🏾🥃 

And yes, at 14yrs old I was doing the “horizontal hula” 🙋🏽‍♂️🤦🏽‍♂️ - and for the record, it was not 30 seconds. Probably lasted for like days, ‘cos I’m a savage, but my memory is a little foggy 😂

Mahalo for making PAPATUI the #1 new men’s grooming line of 2024. 

Available now at all @target stores 🇺🇸 
And PapaTui.Com

This is WILD!! 🤯

My new #Moana2 song
“Can I Get A Chee Hoo” performed in multiple languages from around the world 🌍 🎶🪝

Had a huge cheesy smile on my face watching this the entire time! 

A grateful + standing O 👏🏾👏🏾👏🏾 to all the artists who sang this fun beast of a song in their proud native language! Thank you for your time and TALENT! 🙏🏾 🥃 

Enjoy!!! 

🪝

#CanIGetACheeHoo

Christmas movie night in pj’s with the babies 🍿🎄 

Like every Christmas, I vote to watch Bad Santa, Goodfellas or Scarface, but for some reason I keep getting overruled. 

“Merry Christmas ya filthy animals” 🎅🏾😈🥃

Making the tattoos pop 🔥 
Some preshoot final touches with @papatui_ 

Thank y’all so much for making PapaTui the #1 best new men’s grooming line of 2024. Been a crazy year. 

Merry Christmas 🎄🎁🎅🏾

Available at all @target stores 🇺🇸 

#takebettercare 
#papatui
#magicfingers 😂👋🏾

Krampusschlap is a game you don’t want play with me and my meat hands - unless your @LucyLiu - who slaps me into 2025!
I had it coming 😂👋🏾 

#RedOneMovie streaming now on @PrimeVideo 🌍 📺

Want to thank my friends @jacobandco for this absolutely stunning one of one watch. The detail and artistry is incredible - and the Mana is FELT. 

I don’t have a ton of jewelry, but any and every piece I wear - ring, watch, pendant etc - all have a deep personal meaning and connection to me. 

🪝🇼🇸 

• @jacobandco At the Moana 2 premiere, Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson @therock made an unforgettable appearance, wearing the piece unique Jacob & Co. Matai Tourbillon.

Inspired by Dwayne’s iconic Samoan tribal tattoo, this one-of-a-kind creation reflects his heritage, resilience, and warrior spirit. The intricate black dial patterns echo the profound symbolism of his tattoo, paying homage to his Polynesian roots and his Moana 2 character, Maui.

Crafted with an 18K rose gold case and paired with a black alligator strap, this timepiece marries cultural storytelling with Jacob & Co.’s unparalleled artistry.

#JacobAndCo #InspiredByTheImpossible #therock

@jonbrandoncruz 🎥

These Christmas Elves are really getting under my skin!! 🧝🏼‍♀️🧝🏽😡 

And now on my toes while I was asleep - forcing me to wake up to this VERY unfunny surprise
💤💅🏽🦶🏾

If I’m being honest, I think red polish actually brings out even more hyper masculinity and undeniable sexiness, no? 🤔💁🏽‍♂️

Or maybe I’m just an a**hole for even picking up the Elf to begin with, putting its magic in jeopardy 😂🙋🏽‍♂️

And I love you @kevinhart4real 

#elvesgonewild 
#johnsoncasa

Our little Christmas movie, RED ONE shattered a viewing record for @amazon @primevideo with 50 million viewers this past weekend. 

RED ONE has a long shelf life with multiple verticals - kudos to our Amazon partners for their strategic win, that’s just getting started. 

And most importantly, massive THANK YOU to you and your families around the world who tuned in - we made a little history 🙏🏾🙏🏾🌍 

A- CinemaScore 
90% Audience Rating 

Ain’t too shabby☝🏾 🤜🏾🤛🏼🤗

And make sure you leave cookies and tequila for the big guy….

🎅🏾🥃🍪 

#RedOne
#ChristmasComesHome

#papatui #onlyattarget

* note the second I pull my phone up to see how my “make up” looks (because I have a zoom mtg in 2min) - she slowly starts to move away from the crime scene 😂

My lil tornado said “daddy let me cover up the scars on your head with a little bit of concealer”

“Concealer” = melted marshmallow 👀 

Nice look for my zoom. 
Super cool 👍🏾

#thirdeye 👁️

Our little Christmas movie, RED ONE has finally come home to you and your fams around the world 🌍🎅🏾💫

On @primevideo 📺 

Thanks for making us #1 at the box office last month and now we’re primed and set for a nice long Amazon run in your cribs. 

Enjoy the movie and HAPPY HOLIDAYS, my friends 🍿🎅🏾🛷🌲⛄️ 

And kindly leave cookies and tequila out for your boy on Christmas Eve… 

Dwanta Claus 🎅🏾🤙🏾🥃
